sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁוּל

Transliteration: shûl

Phonetic: shool

BDB Definition:

  1. skirt (of robe)
    1. of high priest's robe
    2. of God's train, city as woman, ignominy, defilement (figuratively)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to hang down

TWOT entry: 2346a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
